OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Dec-12-2012 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-30-2012 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Greg Schaffer, Esq. of Dolan Law Firm, Tel. 415.421.2800, for plaintiff and opposing party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT RELIABLE CAREGIVERS INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is overruled. Plaintiff sufficiently pleads a claim under the CLRA. Plaintiff has cured the previously cited defect by expressly alleging reliance. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2012 Continued To Dec-12-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2012 Continued To Oct-10-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-23-2012 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
James F. Regan, Esq. of Low Ball Lynch, Tel. 415.981.6630, for Defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT RELIABLE CAREGIVERS INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained without leave to amend as to the first and second causes of action and sustained with ten days leave to amend as to the fifth cause of action. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.
